title: trifolium pratense subsp. americanum
intro: Trifolium pratense subsp. americanum, also known as red clover, is a perennial legume native to North America and a subspecies of the white clover plant. Red clover is valued for its medicinal properties, which include isoflavones and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of red clover include reducing menopausal symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting bone health due to its high content of isoflavones, which mimic the effects of estrogen in the body. Red clover can be prepared as herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
